message:
Command `# The SWD fix is in place. Check if amuxbus ports appear in the port LIST (module declaration)
# vs just in the instantiation (they may be in port list but tied off in u_core)
# The real issue is: are amuxbus ports in the module port list? They cause GPL-0326
# Check first 200 lines for module declaration
head -200 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | grep -c "amuxbus"` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# The SWD fix is in place. Check if amuxbus ports appear in the port LIST (module declaration)
# vs just in the instantiation (they may be in port list but tied off in u_core)
# The real issue is: are amuxbus ports in the module port list? They cause GPL-0326
# Check first 200 lines for module declaration
head -200 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | grep -c "amuxbus""}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# The SWD fix is in place. Check if amuxbus ports appear in the port LIST (module declaration)
# vs just in the instantiation (they may be in port list but tied off in u_core)
# The real issue is: are amuxbus ports in the module port list? They cause GPL-0326

head -200 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | grep -c "amuxbus"
